title: i am not myself
description: Lyrics from i am not myself
body:
i am not my self
i'm someone else watching
and i see them be awesome often
when i'm not lost in my own fiction
my self is to my eye
an amalgamation beyond imagination
i try and suffer every fixation
the slings and arrows i let fly
every time i forget
what my grace is
so i'm patient
zeroed expectations
what happens when i start acting
up til now i've been faking
the space behind the mask is vacant
when i say shit
cuz my method visibly causes you pains
if the audience pans
what madness can the artist explain
i know i can't demand payment
i gotta eat but that's not the point of this relationship
that's not why i made this
collection of faces for you to interface with
this is interfaith
i'm trying to get to you but we on different interstates
only connect to pages and cells
only connect through hits and sales
so i eat whatever leads to shit that sells
shanghai any ship that sails
bang my flagon
on the table rapping my peg leg
walk the plank cuz that's how you get straight
hang high like a flag and flappin
so y'all know where to look when you're clappin
dead eye, i'm a magnet
let fly and i'll catch it
